title: Problems and Solutions: The Ineffable
description: The last head of the Platonic Academy argues that the first principle is so beyond being that even calling it 'One' says too much.
introduction: The last head of the Platonic Academy argues that the first principle is so beyond being that even calling it 'One' says too much.

translation.text: Is the first principle even the One? Or is it beyond even unity? We must confess our ignorance.
